examples: The theoretical framework for AGMA is composed of three parts: the goals of management accounting, technology application and affair management of accounting.
The Association of Greater Manchester Authorities (AGMA) wants to create a by-law to set a minimum price.
Ian Ratcliffe, from Stockport Council, said AGMA was looking at the idea and would report back in October.
Although members of AGMA voted in favour of the report, Mrs Williams said it was a paper of options and not firm plans.
